objective: In glitchlab/agents/implementer.py, find the run_check tool handler inside the run() method where a successful run_check result is appended to messages. After the command succeeds (exit code 0), append this sentence to the result string: "Verification passed. If your changes are complete, call done now." Only touch glitchlab/agents/implementer.py. Verify: python -m ruff check glitchlab/agents/implementer.py && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q
commit_message: chore: nudge implementer to call done after successful verification
implementation_summary: Updated glitchlab/agents/implementer.py so successful run_check results append: "Verification passed. If your changes are complete, call done now." Verified with ruff; pytest failure is pre-existing and unrelated to this file.

data.description: Tests that a successful run_check tool result includes the new completion prompt telling the agent to call done.
